mapper.select: SELECT f.flower_id, f.flower_name, f.price, fi.sold_quantity, f.main_image as image, f.shop_id FROM flowers f JOIN flowers_inventory fi ON f.flower_id = fi.flower_id WHERE f.status = 1 ORDER BY fi.sold_quantity DESC LIMIT 5;

SELECT f.flower_id, f.flower_name, f.price, f.main_image, f.description, f.tags, f.season, f.meaning, f.care_tips, f.status, fi.stock_quantity, fi.sold_quantity, fi.safety_stock FROM flowers f JOIN flowers_inventory fi ON f.flower_id = fi.flower_id
f.category_id = #{categoryId}
AND f.status = 1
ORDER BY f.updated_at DESC

SELECT f.flower_id, f.flower_name, f.price, f.main_image, f.description, f.tags, f.season, f.meaning, f.care_tips, f.status, fi.stock_quantity, fi.sold_quantity, fi.safety_stock FROM flowers f JOIN flowers_inventory fi ON f.flower_id = fi.flower_id
f.flower_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{flowerName}, '%')
AND f.status = 1
ORDER BY f.updated_at DESC

SELECT f.flower_id, f.flower_name, f.category_id, f.price, f.main_image, f.description, f.tags, f.season, f.meaning, f.care_tips, fi.stock_quantity, fi.sold_quantity, s.shop_id, s.shop_name, COUNT(fav.favorite_id) AS favoriteCount FROM flowers f JOIN flowers_inventory fi ON f.flower_id = fi.flower_id JOIN shops s ON f.shop_id = s.shop_id LEFT JOIN favorites fav ON f.flower_id = fav.flower_id WHERE f.flower_id = #{flowerId} AND f.status = 1

SELECT f.flower_id AS flowerId, f.flower_name AS flowerName, f.main_image AS mainImage, f.price, f.tags, f.meaning, f.season, c.category_name AS categoryName, f.shop_id AS shopId, s.shop_name AS shopName, s.rating, IFNULL(i.stock_quantity, 0) AS stockQuantity, IFNULL(i.sold_quantity, 0) AS soldQuantity, CASE WHEN f.status = 0 THEN '下架' WHEN f.status = 1 THEN '上架' ELSE '未知' END AS status, DATE_FORMAT(f.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createAt, COUNT(fav.favorite_id) AS collectCount FROM flowers f LEFT JOIN category c ON f.category_id = c.category_id LEFT JOIN shops s ON f.shop_id = s.shop_id LEFT JOIN flowers_inventory i ON f.flower_id = i.flower_id LEFT JOIN favorites fav ON f.flower_id = fav.flower_id
f.status = 1
AND f.flower_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{flowerName}, '%')
AND c.category_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{categoryName}, '%')
AND f.tags LIKE CONCAT('%', #{tag}, '%')
AND f.price >= #{minPrice}
AND f.price <= #{maxPrice}
GROUP BY f.flower_id, f.flower_name, f.main_image, f.price, f.tags, f.meaning, f.season, c.category_name, f.shop_id, s.shop_name, s.rating, i.stock_quantity, i.sold_quantity, f.status, f.created_at
ORDER BY f.price ASC
ORDER BY f.price DESC
ORDER BY IFNULL(i.sold_quantity, 0) DESC
ORDER BY COUNT(fav.favorite_id) DESC
ORDER BY f.created_at DESC
SELECT u.nickname, u.image as avatar, r.content, r.rating, r.created_at as reviewTime from reviews r left join users u on r.user_id = u.user_id where flower_id = #{flowerId}

select r.review_id, r.flower_id, f.flower_name, u.nickname, u.image as avatar, r.created_at, r.rating from reviews r left join users u on r.user_id = u.user_id left join flowers f on r.flower_id = f.flower_id order by r.created_at desc limit 5
